{{Quote|You're a superstitious species, you know that?|[[Nym/Legends|Nym]]|<ref name="SC3">[[Starfighter: Crossbones 3|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3]]</ref>}}
The '''Mere''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] that hailed from the [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Maramere]]. They had [[Color/Legends|orange]] fur covering their bodies, and could breathe underwater. They had both [[Nose/Legends|noses]] and gills.

{{Species-stub}}
